programme.desc: Darcie must save the family from dark truths that threaten to destroy everything.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Gamma Pi Omicron pledges retreat while Pete recovers. Sarah bonds with Jordan, and Allison gets her way.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: Inspiring Love

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: I'm In Love With A Church Girl
programme.desc: Miles Montego was king of the streets as a high-level drug trafficker. When Miles meets Vanessa, he's drawn to her beauty and her spirituality. As their connection grows, both are tested to their last ounce of faith in God in each other.

programme.title: Wish
programme.desc: Wish is a beautiful, confident, woman, who makes no apologies for who she is and what she does. Very sexually free, Wish goes after what she wants. If she feels like making out with a total stranger, she will. If she feels like bringing home the waitress, she will, and she will do it with the ruthlessness of a man, but with the finesse of a woman. Wish is a force to be reckoned with, until one day she meets a woman who turns her world upside down, and nothing will ever be the same.

programme.title: Triangle Slave
programme.desc: Orphaned brothers Keith and Kareem struggle in the world today after loosing their mother was murdered by their father to pay a debt. Through adversary and perseverance, they rose to become two of the biggest drug kingpins in Philadelphia. But when a woman named Sapphire comes between them, will their empire collapse under the weight of their greed and jealousy?

programme.title: The House on Adams Drive
programme.desc: Sean is convinced the only way to keep the woman of his dreams happy is by obtaining as much money as possible. His friend Kordell, who’s an adult film star, helps him with a way to make a lot of money overnight. When they’re sent to a house to possibly film a scene, that turns out to be a real life exorcism.

programme.title: The Housekeeper 2
programme.desc: After moving on from her sordid past, Sharease flourishes in her new life and success. When her son Adonis kidnapped, she seeks help from a ghost of her past to rescue him.

programme.title: The Forsaken
programme.desc: After discovering an old book, Alex becomes drawn into the harrowing stories of cowboys Latt and Stylz. As he reads about their treasure hunt and daring adventures, Alex finds inspiration in their courage and friendship to use in his own life and help him find the strength to overcome his own obstacles.

programme.title: Heretics
programme.desc: Recovered footage of teens who break into an abandoned house and discover a cult intent on sacrificing them.

programme.title: Hansel VS Gretel
programme.desc: Under a spell, Gretel creates a coven of witches. Hansel must fight his twin and the forces controlling her.

programme.title: Zombie Apocalypse
programme.desc: After a zombie plague wipes out 90% of America, survivors fight cross-country to Catalina Island.

programme.title: Dragonquest
programme.desc: A young hero must awaken a dragon to battle a legendary creature summoned by a warlord.

programme.title: Road Wars: Max Fury
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, sisters try to save their mother armed only with a muscle car and ammo.

programme.title: Claw
programme.desc: After blowing a tire in the middle of the desert, best friends Kyle and Julia are forced to spend the night in a remote ghost town. While they reluctantly settle in for the evening, off in the not so far away mountains, trouble brews. A velociraptor, brought to life by a disgraced scientist, escapes its enclosure and makes its way towards the ghost town, hungry and aggravated. With the prehistoric predator now stalking them throughout the sprawling property and no outside help to speak of, Kyle and Julia must work together to outsmart the deadly creature in order to survive.

programme.title: It Hatched
programme.desc: A couple moves from Nashville to a remote fjord in Iceland in search of peace and serenity. Their plans are horrifically altered when an ancient demon escapes from under their basement floor and Mira gives birth to an egg.

programme.title: Suicide Forest Village
programme.desc: From the Director of The Grudge comes a terrifying, supernatural tale inspired by an infamous Japanese forest known for its frequent suicides and disappearances. A group of unsuspecting friends stumble upon a mysterious box and a curse begins to spread. To break the curse, the group must venture to the source of the box deep within the Jukai Forest. Its said that the land holds a grudge against trespassers where once you enter, you have no hope of escaping with your life.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: The House That Screamed
programme.desc: Elvira showcases the 1969 Horror Thriller The House That Screamed. The story centers at a isolated school for girls where students keep disappearing.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A movie buff opens a prop museum, but a rival collector could put everything at risk. Then, Jackson is being followed by a dark force, but will his attempts to rid himself of it work?

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: An art collector could never have anticipated the ways a terrifying painting would change his life. Then, life in prison is tough, but Elmer's pet spiders always have his back.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A siren lures a doctor into her trap to carry out a diabolical plan. Then, a teenage girl must fight off a demonic plague when she realizes her family might be infected.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Tim finds the answer to needing more hours in the day, but is it worth the cost? Then, when a small town opens a time capsule, the local librarian must try to keep history from repeating itself.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A family is detained, and a young girl's distressing symptoms quickly escalate without her medication. Then, when the dead rise from their graves, townspeople take justice into their own hands.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: Joe's closest friends are the model toys of his favorite scary movie monsters. Then, a Public TV station is overwhelmed when the appraisal of an antique book accidentally summons a dark force.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A marketing ploy at a haunted Bed and Breakfast becomes way too realistic. Then, an exterminator gets more than he bargained for when he takes on a big job.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A misunderstanding in space ensures two astronauts go down in history for all the worst reasons. Then, Lola is convinced her brother is trying to kill her... but she's worried about the wrong monster.

programme.title: Creepshow
programme.desc: A drain clog turns out to be more than just a little matted hair and soap scum. Then, scientists fight to contain the creature they've been studying - but is the true threat one of them?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys Stock" - Grannie prepares her special mash to help cure Mrs. Drysdale of her drinking problem while Jed does as Mr. Drysdale suggests and buys stock: cows, goats, pigs, and chickens! programme.title: CESTVS -The Roman Fighter-
programme.desc: Cestvs wins his first fight of the qualifier, but he is irritated for reasons he doesn't understand, and even clashes with the other fighting slaves. He can feel that his training has produced results, but something's not right... As Cestvs struggles with the problem, Zafar tells him to open his eyes. He must discover the answer for himself and apply what he has learned. After training with a clear mind and doing some self-reflection, Cestvs finds the feeling he's been looking for. However, his next opponent is a powerful professional gladiator who uses a style unlike anything he's faced before.

programme.title: CESTVS -The Roman Fighter-
programme.desc: The final fight of the qualifier for the tournament has begun. Cestvs' opponent is Felix the professional gladiator, also known as the Red Storm. Felix is confident, repeatedly throwing what appear to be wide swings and calling Cestvs a sucker, as he is well-versed in fighting in cramped arenas. Cestvs attempts to focus on reading his opponent's attacks, but he suffers damage as he takes blow after blow. Meanwhile, Felix doesn't miss the change in Cestvs and demonstrates the true strength of the Red Storm.

programme.title: CESTVS -The Roman Fighter-
programme.desc: A close-range fight forces Cestvs up against the wall. Not only does he have nowhere to run, but Cestvs unfortunately injured his ankle when Felix's powerful blows forced him to the ground. "If I can't retreat, then I'll counterattack here!" His efforts appear ineffective as he barely evades Felix's tempestuous blows, waiting for an opportunity to strike back. "No matter how big my disadvantage, as long as there's something I can do, I won't give up!" Just then, Felix's attacks begin to change, and Cestvs finds his golden opportunity.

programme.title: CESTVS -The Roman Fighter-
programme.desc: Cestvs defeats Felix with a miraculous single blow. The defeated Felix tells Cestvs to race up to the top before departing. In Sicily, where the main event will be held, Cestvs is reunited with Emden, who is excited for their rematch, as well as Ruska. Ruska insists that it's impossible for Cestvs to win and that he should withdraw from the tournament, but Cestvs refuses. "These fists are already soaked in blood. All I can do is move forward!" Each fighter carries his own feelings and desires in his heart as the Emperor Nero's tournament begins...

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: C is for Cookie, and RC is for Recipe Club! We had our friends bring cookies to swap, taste, and debate. Baker Nicole Rucker brought a cookie game-changer: Jacques Torres’ Famous Chocolate Chip Cookie. She traded with podcasting legend Hrishikesh Hirway, who brought a Brown Butter Chocolate Chip Coconut Pecan Cookie. Baker Jennifer Yee brings her own White Lotus cookie to swap. For whom will C stand for Champion? Tune in and find out the best cookie recipe!

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Alone at last. Some peace and quiet, and a meal all to ourselves. Except we’re with our other Recipe Club members, of course. Becky Joiner brings in her Leftovers Crunchwrap. Chef Marc Johnson has his Indian Butter Chickpeas. And Chris Chen has some good ol’ Golden Japanese Curry. It’s Dinner for One, but we forced them to share, discuss, and decide whose recipe is best.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Spark up the grill and click those tongs, Recipe Club is having a backyard BBQ. Chef Joshua Skenes made homemade Pork Jerky. Chef Deborah Pak of Soban LA brought Korean BBQ Pork Ribs. Returning competitor Chef Justin Pichetrungsi of Anajak Thai brought a Grilled Teriyaki Shrimp Pineapple Bowl. Which recipe was the best for grillmasters and grill lovers alike? Throw on an apron, take a listen, and find out!

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: Open the trunk and start pre-gaming…it’s time for a Recipe Club tailgate. Becky Joiner repped her hometown with some Crab Cakes. Darin Bresnitz, author/host of Snacky Tunes brought Pulled Pork. Pijja Palace owner Avish Naran brought some Texan Frito Pies. Who needs to go to the game when we’ve got food like this at the tailgate? Which recipe is best, though? Pull up a foldable chair and find out.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Korean Tangerine Salad with Chile: Deuki Hong and Matt Rodbard stopped by the studio to share some of their fantastic recipes from Koreaworld: A Cookbook! Check out this Jeju Tangerine Chile Salad...a crisp, refreshing, tangy dish with some (adjustable) heat.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Hetty McKinnon's Eggplant Mapo: Hetty McKinnon, an Australian Chinese cookbook author and James Beard Award finalist, stops by the studio to show Chris Ying how to make her Eggplant Mapo—a delicious twist on Mapo Tofu.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Pepperoni Loaf Pimento Grilled Cheese & Everything-Spice Flatbread: Andrew makes Christina Tosi's ultra-indulgent pepperoni loaf, then combines it with David Chang's pimento cheese to put together a crazy grilled cheese sandwich; Andrew recreates David Chang's everything-spiced flatbread—a recipe that started with Chinese bing dough, took a stop in Istanbul, and ended in a New York deli. It's flaky, buttery and delicious!

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Caesar Salad & Fettuccini Alfredo: Chris and Andrew cook two inviting recipes from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Creamy fettuccine Alfredo and a Caesar salad packed with umami. These classics are a comforting and exceptional balance of heavy and light that will put you at ease.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Clam Chowder & Spaghetti with Clams - Andrew prepares two recipes from Dinner Time Live: A clam chowder so cozy and good that New Englanders would approve, and Spaghetti with Clams—a simple and delicious pasta dish.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Lemongrass Beef Skewers, Bánh Mì Tea Sandwiches, Spicy Beef Stew - Chris and Andrew make three different dishes from the Seven Courses of Beef episode of Dinner Time Live, including an interpretation of Vietnamese Bo Kho (a spicy beef stew) and Bánh Mì reimagined as a dainty tea sandwich.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: A natural haven of tasty delights and local delicacies, the Croix Rousse is Lyon's market gem. From goat farms where the region's most delicious cheeses are contrived to bakeries that produce only organic bread. This episode comes with a warning, be prepared to get very hungry indeed!

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Food markets have a strong tradition in the Netherlands and many citizens count on their long street markets for their fresh food supplies. One of the oldest and most famous markets of the Netherlands is the Albert Cuyp Markt, a street market stretching along the upcoming (and "hip") neighborhood of de Pijp.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Placed in the middle of Palermo's ancient streets, it is almost difficult to walk. All around there is a swarm of colors and perfumes. There is everything the Mediterranean island, so rich in agricultural traditions, has to offer. Street food here is a must, including dozens of roasted, salted, pickled, and fried specialties one can count on.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Perhaps one of the most beautiful and well-organized food market buildings in Europe is the Mercado Central of Valencia. Built on the area where an open-air market stood for centuries, the Valencian style Art Noveau construction is a 'Cathederal of senses'.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Fish Market or Torget (the square) has a charming location in the heart of the city between the fjords and Bergen's seven mountains. On the harbor, the stalls sell an incredible variety of fresh fish and seafood like urchins, scallops, prawns, and lobsters, but also local farm food.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The market of San Benedetto in Cagliari is the island's belly. It is one of the biggest fresh produce markets in Europe and arguably said to be the biggest fish market in Europe. A paradise for food lovers, where every stall keeper has a story to tell.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Vegetables
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques prepare artichokes—several ways—including artichoke hearts stuffed with spinach and mushroom Duxelle. Julia demonstrates her secret to ever-green cooked string beans and butter bruised peas. Jacques counters with his aromatic Tomato Provencal.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Beef Stew
programme.desc: Sounds rather ordinary for this celebrated duet…but here, Jacques and Julia demonstrate why Beef Burgundy and Pot Roast have beens favorite “classic” recipes (here and in France) for what seems like “forever,” and they put their own signature on it “Swiss cheese mashed potatoes” (for the Beef Burgundy), and “soft ribbon noodles” (fort the Pot Roast).

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Jumping into a Thai tuk tuk taxi, Tony attempts to soak up Thai culture, and get lost in the cuisine of Chiang Mai, Thailand.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony travels to the grain-belt capital of Minneapolis, Minnesota to experience firsthand the conflict between creative independent operators and generic franchises.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Anthony travels to Tokyo, where he begins in the Tsujiki market and then is introduced to techniques in preparing edomae sushi. He also learns the diets of Sumo wrestlers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Arcachon, France: Here, Bourdain first learned to love food as a child. Returning for a trip down memory lane, Tony enjoys childhood staples, including steak frites, gaufres (waffles), soupe de pecheur (fisherman's soup) and fresh oysters.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Portugal: Portuguese cuisine holds a dear place in Tony's culinary heart. Tony travels to Porto, home of the famous Port wine, where he is immediately exposed to the codfish and the almost mythical place it holds in Portuguese cuisine and culture.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: St. Petersburg, Russia: Tony plays spy in Russia and sets off to locate the best blinis and borscht St. Petersburg has to offer.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: San Sebastian, Spain: Tony explores the food-crazed Basque culture. Tony's guide, Chef Luis Irizar, takes Tony into the underworld of Basque gastronomic societies. Later, Tony explores the city's tapas bars.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In the Caribbean paradise of St. Martin, Tony eats a healthy Rastafarian meal with a freedom fighter, helps prepare grub for a food caravan, discovers foodstuffs not available at American supermarkets, and finally relaxes at a beach bar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony catches a Bayou alligator, cools off with a world-famous snow cone, gets in trouble with the law, eats jambalaya with a dancing chef, and relaxes to some local jazz.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Mekong River, Vietnam: On the river, Tony drinks a lot of Mekong moonshine with the welcoming owners of a duck farm. Although seduced by his Vietnam experience, Tony is not sure the royal dish Birds Nest Soup is all its cracked up to be.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA: New York chef, Anthony Bourdain, descends into the culinary underbelly of his metropolitan nemesis, Los Angeles, where he experiences the trials of celebrity fame and the joys of West Coast cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: What is a Carioca? The natives of Rio de Janiero, Brazil are lovable scamps who find ways to avoid work, preferring the beach, flirting, and hanging out at restaurants and bars instead. Tony, under the tutelage of an exemplary Carioca, gives the lifestyle a try.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Join Tony on his quest to characterize the perfect bar in New York City. Discover the importance of a maniacal bartender, the proper chemical makeup of drinks, the joys of seedy dive-bars, and the need for late-night snacks.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: A spontaneous layover in Bangkok, Thailand leads Tony into the city, where he tries dishes of deep-fried frog skins and pla rah, a fish-paste that has fermented anywhere from three months to a year.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Scotland: Beginning in Glasgow, Tony experiences the heart-clogging glory of deep fried pizza, deep fried mars bars, and deep fried pickled eggs! Moving on to more traditional fare, Tony tastes haggis and learns to hunt and fish for his food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Oaxaca, Mexico: Chef Tony Bourdain explores the exotic and colorful indigenous zone of Mexico's Oaxaca region where he tastes toasted grasshoppers and other delicacies. His adventure ends with mariachi music and, of course, lots of tequila.

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Five Little Monsters Jumping On The Bed - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a silly and slightly spooky version of the classic kids’ rhyme, Five Little Monkeys, with monsters instead of monkeys. It’s a great song for practicing counting down from five, and for teaching little monsters (and children!) not to jump on the bed.

programme.title: Red Light Green Light - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Tobee learned all about traffic safety in school today! He learned how to walk in a crosswalk, to look both ways before crossing a street, and what the colors of a traffic light mean. That reminds Caitie of a song about stopping and going called “Red Light, Green Light.” Together, they sing and dance, stopping and starting again and again. Tobee and Caitie have a blast, and you can join the fun, too! Green light!

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Weepy French Onion Soup - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Weepy French Onion Soup. But the four weepy onions they need are VERY tricky to find. Will Humble, Grumble, and Stumble be able to spot all the onions and get back to the kitchen without crying too much? Watch and see!

programme.title: Put On Your Shoes - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s a Super Simple Song all about getting dressed! Sing along as we put on our shoes, jacket, hat, and scarf and then head out for a walk with the family.

programme.title: With My Heart - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Feel the warmth and learn the five senses in this heart warming Super Simple sensory song for kids. It’s also a perfect song to celebrate all parents. I can hear with my ears. I can see with my eyes.

programme.title: Let's Count To 100 - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: We are learning to count to 100 with Finny the Shark! This is a perfect numbers song for young kids and preschoolers! Let’s count to 100. Counting’s so much fun. Let’s count to 100. We’ll start from number 1.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy help Louis with a chaotic tennis match and AI machine, leading to his success. Jett and Lucie recover a lost golden record from an alien spacecraft, sparking joy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At Noah’s park, Camira hunts block dino eggs with Super Wings, facing surprises when Golden Girl snatches the prize and the egg escapes! Powered by new pod gear, Camira triumphs, while Jett braves the Sahara to find Latu and a fennec fox.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy jet to Jeju, helping Taehoon’s robot save Grandma’s shellfish from a giant fish, then team up to free it. On Mars, Jett and Marty chase Roy's lost bags, while Jinga dazzles with an out-of-this-world tour.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy join Hazel and Runi in Australia to help animals escape wildfires, then fly to Seoul where tiny Antny enters the Strongest Bug Contest, faces rampaging rivals, and, with Super Wings’ upgrades, helps save the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Marty help wash Maxy the giant plane and calm geysers at Oyunuma Pond, then deliver a Wright Flyer to Braden, sparking a time-hop to the Wright brothers, where teamwork lifts spirits and the Flyer takes flight.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Lucie, and Runi’s friendly contest becomes teamwork when they rescue toys from a Vietnam factory fire. Soon, Jett races to Dino World, freeing stranded friends and reuniting a T-Rex family as quakes rumble. Super Wings deliver!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Noah and the Dino Wings turn hail into fruit seeds, planting a thriving farm with Jett’s help and saving Dino World from a flood. Later, teamwork and a daring rescue inside Supersaurus bring the friends closer as everyone returns home safe.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Sicily, Jett and Curie foil invisibility pranks and stop a wild volcano eruption with Curie’s snow launcher, teaching Renata as chaos turns to learning. Aboard Ned’s ship, Super Electric Suits help them rescue everyone from a junk robot.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While the World Spaceport celebrates Jimbo’s retirement, Jett faces a UFO and Space Monster, piloting World Robot as chaos erupts. The team unites, time freezes, and Jimbo reveals Megamon is an old friend, choosing to stay with everyone.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and the Super Wings liven up Xiang Xiang’s Tanghulu shop, rescuing everyone from a syrupy mess and drawing big crowds. In Dino World, the Dino Wings halt a Dinobase takeover and reunite a wandering pterosaur hatchling with its mom.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Floods and thunder strike Dino World but Trico overcomes his fear to help Jett and the Dino Wings rescue every dino with paper boats and planes. Later Noah and Mom’s dino costume adventure leads to a mix-up with real maiasauras, and families reunite.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Paris, Jett and Curie shrink to save moles from a burst pipe during a wild croquet chase. Later, Jett and Sara help Princess Maribel when magical dress chaos erupts, restoring order so the party sparkles brighter than ever.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On the moon, Jett and Curie outsmart dust storms and shield a spacecraft to help Kajsa ride her new bike. In Mexico’s Baja Desert, Jett and Marty clear boulders so Big Wheel can race again and roll to victory, powered by Super Wings spirit.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Munich, Jett and Marty foil Golden Boy and Girl’s wolf costume prank during Mila’s parade, saving everyone from a river dunk. Later in Singapore, Jett, Traver, and Lien’s robot dogs safely stop runaway giant fireworks, rescuing the festival.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Copenhagen, dinos escape through portals as Jett, Lucie, and Super Wings rescue a brachiosaur and guide everyone home. Across the globe, megabot Super Wings unite to send dinos back through swirling portals, saving the world together.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At a deep-sea base, Super Wings and ocean pals unite to hoist a damaged base after a belt tug-of-war. In Madagascar, Eddie uses comic-book courage to find an elephant bird feather and save his dad in a thrilling cliffside rescue.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake (Classic)

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry's world-traveling cousin Apple Dumplin' stops at Berry Bitty City. What starts as a brief visit becomes a series of comical misadventures that ends with Apple finding a new home with Strawberry and her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesnt think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try, by recounting the tale of his great-great-grandfather Riffle the Wild West hero!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate to Grace's food drive - put on a movie premiere in the caboose! programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Detective BJ is on the case when several sports balls suddenly disappear. Determined to find the mysterious ball thief, BJ falsely accuses Riff of being the thief. BJ learns he cannot jump to conclusions and must find the whole story to see who the thief really is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Celebrating her birthday in the park with friends, Layla is more interested in hot dogs than her mother's Middle Eastern food. programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Captain Pickles and Wonder Princess both wanted to be the super-est superheroes. When Captain Pickles said he could jump over the moon, everyone wanted to see. programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney comes up with the idea to have a sports day in the park. All day, they play games like soccer and hopscotch among others, all for fun. programme.title: Barney and Friends

programme.title: Barney and Friends

When Baby Bop hesitates on keeping her promise to watch Ryan's pet frog, Barney tells her the story of The Frog Prince. And Baby Bop learns about keeping her promises.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney's friends transform the task of collecting litter pieces scattered across the park into an engaging game. Barney steps in and proves to each friend that their uniqueness makes them extraordinary.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Tony excitedly takes his kite to the park to share with his friends, an unexpected gust of wind sends it soaring into the branches of a tree! programme.title: World War II: Saving the Reality
programme.desc: Narrated by Dan Aykroyd. Tells the story of an individual who owns the largest private collection of World War II artifacts in the world. Over 50 interviews with veterans and survivors of the war help tell the story of the meaning of the over 7,000 individual items in the collection of Kenneth W. Rendell.

programme.title: Surrender on the USS Missouri
programme.desc: On September 2nd, 1945, World War II came to its official end aboard a legendary battleship anchored in Tokyo Bay: the USS Missouri. Some seventy million people had died during the war, but now the fighting would end not with a rifle shot but rather with the swift stroke of a ceremonial pen.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI focuses on the sailors, soldiers, airmen and marines that witnessed the official Japanese surrender. It was one of the most monumental days in history, and only a few witnesses remain.The USS Missouri hadn't been in the fight long, heading into the Pacific theater of war in 1944, but she would become one of the most famous military ships in history when all was said and done. Mighty Mo had been involved in the vicious fight at Iwo Jima and then headed for Okinawa, where she dodged suicidal Kamikaze air attacks during World War II's last great battle. Missouri then bombed Japan before being told to leave the coast for no apparent reason. The reason turned out to be two atomic bombs that were set to be dropped on the cities of Hiroshima and Nagasaki.Through interviews with those who served on the battleship, the film also follows the USS Missouri from its construction, through varied battles in the Pacific, to its final resting place as a memorial and museum in Pearl Harbor.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI features exclusive drone footage of the Missouri, plus never-before-seen photos of the surrender ceremony provided by those who were there. Pacific War historian Daniel Martinez also lends his perspective to the film.

programme.title: Rommel: The Soldier, The Son, and Hitler
programme.desc: ROMMEL: THE SOLDIER, THE SON, AND HITLER provides rare insight into the military career and personal life of Germany's most famous WWII commander, Field Marshal Erwin Rommel. Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. Never a member of the Nazi party, Rommel detested the blending of politics and war. He would quickly discover that both were always in play in Hitler's Germany.Rommel was somewhat nave to Hitler's ways until the latter days of the Afrika Korps defeat in North Africa in 1943. By then, Rommel started to surmise that Germany's fate was sealed. In charge of the famed and flawed Atlantic Wall in western Europe in late 1943, Rommel tried his best to prepare France for the Allied invasion. In the end, it would not be enough. D-Day's success only reinforced Rommel's belief that Adolf Hitler should sue for peace in the west.It was an opinion that Hitler found treasonous.

programme.title: Grandpa's War Story Goes Viral
programme.desc: For Alaskan teenager Henry De Hoop, social media platforms such as Facebook have provided a unique opportunity to share the World War II story of his grandfather, James (Jim) Schmidt, with a global audience. Narrated by Liev Schreiber, GRANDPAS WAR STORY GOES VIRAL shares the remarkable account of Jims World War II service and military career, as well as Henrys efforts to generate interest in his grandfathers war journey and launch a letter-writing campaign on his behalf.Like 16 million others of his generation, Jim responded to the national call to duty following the bombing of Pearl Harbor in 1941. The twist in the story? Jim was only 14 when he enlisted, and the eighth-grade Californian left home without telling his parents. After being wounded in the invasion of Sicily, Jims age was eventually revealed and he was sent home. Not to be deterred, Jim would do stints in both the U.S. Navy and Merchant Marines before finally reaching 18 and officially rejoining the Army. Grandson Henry marveled that Jim joined the war effort at the same age he was when he first shared Jim's story on social media.GRANDPAS WAR JOURNEY GOES VIRAL charts a story of service that began in a movie theater in 1942 where the film Parachute Battalion grabbed a boys attention and ends in the jungles of Vietnam more than two decades later.

programme.title: Surrender on the USS Missouri
programme.desc: On September 2nd, 1945, World War II came to its official end aboard a legendary battleship anchored in Tokyo Bay: the USS Missouri. Some seventy million people had died during the war, but now the fighting would end not with a rifle shot but rather with the swift stroke of a ceremonial pen.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI focuses on the sailors, soldiers, airmen and marines that witnessed the official Japanese surrender. It was one of the most monumental days in history, and only a few witnesses remain.The USS Missouri hadn't been in the fight long, heading into the Pacific theater of war in 1944, but she would become one of the most famous military ships in history when all was said and done. Mighty Mo had been involved in the vicious fight at Iwo Jima and then headed for Okinawa, where she dodged suicidal Kamikaze air attacks during World War II's last great battle. Missouri then bombed Japan before being told to leave the coast for no apparent reason. The reason turned out to be two atomic bombs that were set to be dropped on the cities of Hiroshima and Nagasaki.Through interviews with those who served on the battleship, the film also follows the USS Missouri from its construction, through varied battles in the Pacific, to its final resting place as a memorial and museum in Pearl Harbor.SURRENDER ON THE USS MISSOURI features exclusive drone footage of the Missouri, plus never-before-seen photos of the surrender ceremony provided by those who were there. Pacific War historian Daniel Martinez also lends his perspective to the film.

programme.title: Rommel: The Soldier, The Son, and Hitler
programme.desc: ROMMEL: THE SOLDIER, THE SON, AND HITLER provides rare insight into the military career and personal life of Germany's most famous WWII commander, Field Marshal Erwin Rommel. Told from the perspective of Erwin's son Manfred, it is the story of what happens when a career soldier runs afoul of a dictator.Highly decorated and one of Hitler's favorite commanders in the early years of World War II, the Desert Fox, as his British adversaries labeled him, was somewhat of an enigma. Never a member of the Nazi party, Rommel detested the blending of politics and war. He would quickly discover that both were always in play in Hitler's Germany.Rommel was somewhat nave to Hitler's ways until the latter days of the Afrika Korps defeat in North Africa in 1943. By then, Rommel started to surmise that Germany's fate was sealed. In charge of the famed and flawed Atlantic Wall in western Europe in late 1943, Rommel tried his best to prepare France for the Allied invasion. In the end, it would not be enough. D-Day's success only reinforced Rommel's belief that Adolf Hitler should sue for peace in the west.It was an opinion that Hitler found treasonous.

programme.title: America's Socialist Experiment
programme.desc: A revealing look at 40 years of socialism in one of Americas conservative cities, Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Between 1910 and 1960, elected socialists including a U.S. Congressman and three mayors reduced corruption, improved conditions for working people, and cleaned up the environment, leaving a mixed legacy to which both Democrats and Republicans lay claim today.

programme.title: Landslide: A Portrait of President Herbert Hoover
programme.desc: Herbert Hoover was a politician and a humanitarian whose legacy has been largely defined by the Great Depression. When he was elected president in a landslide victory in 1928, Hoover had never before held public office. Even so, his humanitarian work and career as a mining engineer, businessman and U.S. Secretary of Commerce carried him to a win. When the stock market crashed on October 29, 1929, Hoovers agenda was derailed by the worsening economic crisis. Despite various efforts to pull the nation out of depression, Hoovers unsuccessful attempts led to his sound defeat by Franklin Roosevelt just four years after his landslide victory. LANDSLIDE looks at the life of the controversial figure through interviews with notable historians and Hoover scholars.The program explores the facts and fictions behind the presidency of Herbert Hoover including The Great Depression and the role of the Federal Reserve. Hoovers early life in Iowa and abroad, the international experiences that led to his decision to run for office, his presidency and political philosophy, and the lasting impacts of his policy decisions during and after the depression are revealed. Through interviews with notable scholars such as David Kennedy, Amity Shlaes, Robert Reich, Tim Egan and Timothy Walch, this biography sheds new light on Hoovers difficult tenure and enduring legacy.
